zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Olney於1394年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德時，他的父親Lord John de  Olney III40歲，母親Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney30歲。他於大約1407年與Goditha Judith Bozum結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Olney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Olney in Buckinghamshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Olla + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Olney was born in 1394, in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Lord John de  Olney III, was 40 and his mother, Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney, was 30. He married Goditha Judith Bozum about 1407. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1453, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Olney est né en 1394, à Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John de  Olney III, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Goditha Judith Bozum environ 1407. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1453, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Olney 1394 in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John de  Olney III 40 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney 30. Er hat um 1407 Goditha Judith Bozum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1453 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Olneyが1394年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン ウンデルウッドで生まれた時，父Lord John de  Olney IIIは40歳，母Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olneyは30歳であった。約1407年にGoditha Judith Bozumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Olney(이)가 1394년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 운더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John de  Olney III(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1407년 Goditha Judith Bozum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Olney nasceu em 1394, em Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John de  Olney III, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Goditha Judith Bozum aproximadamente 1407. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1453, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Olney родился в 1394 г. в местности вестон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John de  Olney III было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Goditha Judith Bozum около 1407 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1453 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.
